offline_description: It looks like your internet connection has been lost. Please check your network settings and try again.
offline_alert_description: The key features of this site are unavailable.
unknown_error: An unknown error occurred. Check the console for details.
server_error: Server error. Please try again or check back in a few minutes.
server_timeout: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your network connection and reload the page.
server_503: It looks like the server is temporarily down or overloaded. Our team is working to resolve this as quickly as possible. Please check back later.
server_no_response: It looks like the server is inaccessible due to a network error. Please check your network connection and reload the page.
please_search_location: Please search and select a location.
please_search_hip: Please search and select a Hipparcos Catalogue number.
have_not_select_location: You haven't select a location from the result list.
have_not_select_star: You haven't select a star from the results.
service_unavailable: Service not available. Please enter the coordinates manually. ⤴
unknown_service: Unknown geocoding service → Please reload the page
reverse_geo_error: We are having trouble fetching your current address. Please use the determined coordinates as inputs instead. ↓
gps_error: Unable to determine the current location. Please enter the coordinates manually. ⤴
gps_not_supported: Geolocation is not supported by this browser. Please enter the coordinates manually. ⤴
out_of_ephemeris_range: Out of the ephemeris date range: -3000-01-29/+3000-05-06 (Gregorian)
no_season_data_returned: Unable to fetch equinox/solstice date: no data returned.
season_error: Something went wrong while fetching equinox/solstice date. Check the console for details.
no_hip_data_returned: Unable to fetch data: no data returned.
hip_data_not_loaded: Data not loaded → Please reload the page
hip_data_error: Unable to load data. Please reload the page and try again.
hip_data_invalid: Data unavailable. Please reload the page and try again.
hip_out_of_range: Out of the available HIP range: [1, 118322]
no_diagram_data_returned: Unable to fetch diagram: no data returned.
diagram_error: Something went wrong while fetching diagram. Check the console for details.
warn_star_never_rises: This star never rises at this location on this date.
warn_no_radec: No RA/Dec data available for this star in the Hipparcos Catalogue.
warn_entry_hot_in_hip: Entry not found in the Hipparcos Catalogue.
html5_not_supported: Your browser does not support the HTML5 Canvas feature.
2d_not_supported: Your browser does not support the 2D rendering context.
